prompt: SPY is trading at $510 and VIX just spiked to 32. I'm a premium seller - what's the best trade I can put on right now? Give me the specific strikes, expiration, credit, and how I manage it.

assertions.text: Recommends selling premium strategy (iron condor, credit spread, or similar) - not buying options
Explains WHY high VIX favors premium selling (volatility risk premium / IV mean reversion)
Provides specific put and call strike prices or delta guidance (~0.15-0.16 delta short strikes)
States a credit amount or range to collect
Gives 50% profit target as exit AND a stop-loss rule (e.g. 2x credit)
Mentions the 21 DTE rule or gamma risk near expiration
